dialogue: This morning, you did something very bad... again.
You were playing with the ball, and broke two windows.
You were sent to detention at the library, where the teacher is waiting for you...
Oh dear, you're the little mischief-maker who broke two windows, aren't you?
Let's use this detention for some learning.
If you show good progress, this detention won't be too long!
That was correct.
Let us continue with some more exercises!
Now that you are warmed up, time for more questions.
Good ! You understood everything.
Your answers were very satisfying.
I think these exercises are more interesting than writing 100 lines!
Time for the next ones
You are working quite well already.
Maybe I'll let you leave detention sooner
Turn your book to the next page.
Let's see how you answer this time!
You are such a good student, bravo!
A few more questions and your detention will be over!
How will you answer these?
Amazing! You are close to perfection!
This detention went quite fast, thanks to your intelligence.
There are only a few questions yet.
It will be the hardest ones, but I believe in you!
Wonderful! You have answered all the questions I had for you.
I am very proud of you.
Your detention is over now, keep being a good student and congratulations!
